privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic LimeSurvey configuration task. All task data is programmatically generated via the setup_task.sh script. The survey 'Enterprise Cloud Adoption 2024' is created fresh with a Yes/No question 'Q01'. The URL parameter 'rid' is configured for pass-through integration. The task requires configuring redirect URLs to 'https://api.techsample.com/complete' and 'https://api.techsample.com/term' with project ID '9982', though these endpoint domains are fictional and not publicly accessible. The task runs against a Docker-based LimeSurvey 6 instance with MySQL backend, and verifies configuration via database queries.
